text:
Once upon a time in a sleepy little village, there lived a wizard named Olga. Olga wasn often seen humming a magical tune as she fluttered around her cozy workshop.

One quiet afternoon, she heard a peculiar tapping sound coming from outside. curious, she peered out into the woods. There stood a curious little gnome with large, twinkling eyes.

"Hello there!" the gnome cried energetically.

"Oh hello there!" Olga said warmly. "Are you lost?"

The gnome chirped happily. "Oh no! I just flew too far, that’s why I’m here. I'm searching for my special gnome gnome! Can you help me find her?"

Olga pondered for a moment, then chuckled. "Really? That’s quite the quest. Do you have any traits you're looking for?"

The gnome gnome?

"The glittery ones. Really shiny!"

Ah.

"Ah ah ah... Well, all I have are my wings. What does she look like
